title: lathyrus niger
intro: Lathyrus niger, also known as the black pea or grass pea, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus niger include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent anemia. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus niger is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
